mapper.select:
SELECT '1' AS EPRO_PS_DSC ,MIN(FNM.CORP_NO) AS CORP_NO ,MIN(FNM.BRC) AS BRC ,MIN(FNM.APLY_DT) AS APLY_DT ,MIN(FNM.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , 'FILE' '@@' 'UUID_' || MIN(FNM.UUID) '@@' 'UUID_SQ_' || MIN(FNM.UUID_SQ) '@@' listagg(FNM.CONT_NUM||'_'||FNM.CONT_CNT,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by FNM.CONT_NUM,FNM.CONT_CNT) '@@' 'SUBGUBUN_' || MIN(FNM.SUBGUBUN) '@@' MIN(FNM.GUBUN) '@@' MIN(FNM.BIZ_TYPE) '@@' MIN(NVL(FNM.IF_YN,'0')) '@@' TO_CHAR(MIN(FNM.REG_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') '@@' TO_CHAR(MIN(FNM.FEE_DATE),'YYYYMMDD') '@@' TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_TBL_PK ,MIN(FNM.FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE ,MIN(FNM.UUID) AS UUID ,MIN(FNM.UUID_SQ) AS UUID_SQ ,MIN(FNM.FILE_PATH) AS FILE_PATH ,MIN(FNM.FILE_NM) AS FILE_NM ,MIN(FNM.FILE_EXTENSION) AS FILE_EXTENSION ,listagg(FNM.CONT_NUM,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by FNM.CONT_NUM,FNM.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_NUM ,listagg(FNM.CONT_CNT,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by FNM.CONT_NUM,FNM.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_CNT ,MIN(FNM.BIZ_TYPE) AS BIZ_TYPE ,MIN(FNM.GUBUN) AS GUBUN FROM (
SELECT NVL(CUST2.IRS_NUM,CUST3.IRS_NUM) AS CORP_NO , NVL(ECCT.DEPT_CD,POHD.DEPT_CD) AS BRC , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1),'YYYYMM')||'01' AS APLY_DT , ATCH.REG_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN ROUND(ATCH.FILE_SIZE/1048576) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ROUND(ATCH.FILE_SIZE/1048576) END) AS FILE_SIZE , ATCH.UUID AS UUID , ATCH.UUID_SQ AS UUID_SQ , ATCH.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH , ATCH.FILE_NM AS FILE_NM , ATCH.FILE_EXTENSION AS FILE_EXTENSION , NVL(SUB.CONT_NUM,SUB2.PO_NUM) AS CONT_NUM,NVL(SUB.CONT_CNT,0) AS CONT_CNT,ATCH.BIZ_TYPE,NVL(SUB.GUBUN,SUB2.GUBUN) AS GUBUN , ATCH.REAL_FILE_NM,ATCH.IF_YN,ATCH.REG_DATE,ATCH.FEE_DATE , DECODE(SUB.CONT_NUM,NULL,'PO','EC') AS SUBGUBUN FROM STOCATCH ATCH LEFT JOIN (
--PRHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'PRHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,PRHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON( PRDT.PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) WHERE PRHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PRHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) WHERE PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PRDT.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QTDT.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCQTDT QTDT LEFT JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON( QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM) ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = QTDT.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = QTDT.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QTHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --CNHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'CNHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,CNHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD ON( CNDT.EXEC_NUM = CNHD.EXEC_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) WHERE CNHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CNHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.NEGO_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDAP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDAP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDAP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDAP BDAP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDAP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDAP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDAP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDAP.ETC_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDSP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDSP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDSP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDSP BDSP ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDSP.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDSP.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDSP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDSP.TECH_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDVO BDVO ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDVO.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDVO.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDVO.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDVD BDVD ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDVD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDVD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDVD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM BDDT SELECT 'BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM BDDT' AS GUBUN,BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM RQDT SELECT 'BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM RQDT' AS GUBUN,BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BDES.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) WHERE ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT) WHERE ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT) WHERE ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ECPC.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON( PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 SELECT 'IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2' AS GUBUN,IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON( IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --IVAP.ATT_FILE_NUM SELECT 'IVAP.ATT_FILE_NUM' AS GUBUN,IVAP.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = IVAP.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = IVAP.CONT_CNT) WHERE IVAP.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY IVAP.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM ECCT SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM ECCT' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( ECCT.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM PRHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM PRHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT LEFT JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( PRHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( PRDT.PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM RQHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM RQHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( RQHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM CNHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM CNHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT LEFT JOIN STOCCNHD CNHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( CNHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( CNDT.EXEC_NUM = CNHD.EXEC_NUM) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = CNDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = CNDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.RLT_APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDHD BDHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDHD.NEGO_APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDHD.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDHD.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCBDDT BDDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDES.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( BDDT.BID_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND BDDT.BID_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = BDDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = BDDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM POHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM POHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( POHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVHD SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVHD' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( IVHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) ON( PODT.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVAP SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVAP' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( IVAP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( ECMT.CONT_NUM = IVAP.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = IVAP.CONT_CNT) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM BDES' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCECMT ECMT LEFT JOIN STOCRQDT RQDT LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( BDES.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( RQDT.RFX_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = BDES.BID_CNT) ON( ECMT.PR_NUM = RQDT.PR_NUM AND ECMT.PR_SQ = RQDT.PR_SQ) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT
) SUB JOIN (SELECT * FROM STOCECCT WHERE MANUAL_CONT_FLAG IS NULL) ECCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST2 ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = CUST2.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = CUST2.CUST_CD) ON (SUB.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND SUB.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT) ON( ATCH.UUID = SUB.UUID)
LEFT JOIN ( --POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM MANUAL SELECT 'POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM MANUAL' AS GUBUN,POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,POHD.PO_NUM,0 FROM STOCPOHD POHD WHERE POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'MANUAL' GROUP BY POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM,POHD.PO_NUM
UNION ALL --IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 MANUAL SELECT 'IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 MANUAL' AS GUBUN,IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 AS UUID,POHD.PO_NUM,0 FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON( IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) ON( POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) WHERE IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 IS NOT NULL AND POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'MANUAL' GROUP BY IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2,POHD.PO_NUM
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM POHD MANUAL SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM POHD MANUAL' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,POHD.PO_NUM,0 FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( POHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'MANUAL' GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,POHD.PO_NUM
UNION ALL --SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVHD MANUAL SELECT 'SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IVHD MANUAL' AS GUBUN,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID,POHD.PO_NUM,0 FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD LEFT JOIN STOCSCTM SCTM ON( IVHD.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM) ON( IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) ON( POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM) WHERE SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'MANUAL' GROUP BY SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM,POHD.PO_NUM
) SUB2 JOIN STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCCUST CUST3 ON (POHD.GATE_CD = CUST3.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = CUST3.CUST_CD) JOIN (SELECT PO_NUM FROM STOCPOPC WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY PO_NUM) POPC ON (POPC.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) ON (SUB2.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) ON( ATCH.UUID = SUB2.UUID)
JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (ATCH.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND ATCH.PR_BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = '100' AND ATCH.FILE_SIZE > 0 AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (SUB.CONT_NUM IS NOT NULL OR SUB2.PO_NUM IS NOT NULL) AND ( (NVL(ATCH.IF_YN,'0') = '0' AND ATCH.REG_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210301') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMM')||'01')) OR (NVL(ATCH.IF_YN,'0') = '1' AND ATCH.FEE_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210301') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMM')||'01')) )
ORDER BY FILE_NM,NVL(SUB.GUBUN,SUB2.GUBUN),NVL(SUB.CONT_NUM,SUB2.PO_NUM),SUB.CONT_CNT ) FNM GROUP BY FNM.FILE_NM
